UNCLASSIFIED.content: Introduction The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.) Document history Version Date Comment Author 0.9 12-10-2023 Initial document Lodewijk van der Sloot

Service summary.content: The Hypervisor management service includes the technical management of a Hypervisor on physical environment.

Standard service components.content: This Service includes technical management of the Hypervisor. Cegeka shall be responsible in providing the following Services: Security The following activities are part of this service Security component:

Eligibility and Prerequisites.content: Conditions This service supports the following products: Responsibility matrix Activity Customer Cegeka Technical platform management I R, A Change management C R, A Executing standard requests I R, A Executing non-standard requests I R, A On-site interventions outside Cegeka datacenter A, I R, I

Order & billing information.content: Part numbers O.0120_0020_0070_A_S.000 Physical - Hypervisor O.0120_0040_0130_A_S.000 Physical Onsite - Hypervisor O.0120_0040_0140_A_S.000 Hyperconverged management (incl. Hypervisor) Measurement A report is generated on a monthly basis, this report is based on the CMDB and lists all servers and service details for which a Cegeka datacentre – Managed Hypervisor OS Service is delivered. Billing The units are billed against the price of their respective SKU’s. (“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Gold Units”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Silver Units”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Bronze Units”).
